settings_subtitle:
Customize your spiritual journey and
manage your preferences.
tagline: Made with peace in digital gardens
about_description: Masjidy helps you discover nearby mosques, track prayer times, and navigate your spiritual journey with ease. Built with love for the Muslim community.
no_mosques_nearby:
No mosques found nearby.
Tap below to check your current location.
open_maps_error: Could not open Google Maps on this device.
search_timeout: Request timed out. Please check your connection and try again.
search_no_internet: No internet connection. Please check your network.
search_server_error: Server error. Please try again later.
location_services_disabled: Location services are disabled. Please enable GPS.
location_permission_permanently_denied: Location permission is permanently denied. Enable it in app settings.
permission_denied_message: Location permission is required to display prayer times. Please enable it in app settings.
notification_test_body: If you see this on your home screen, notifications are working.
onboarding_subtitle: Select your city to get accurate prayer times instantly
onboarding_gps_note: Your location will refine automatically via GPS
notif_exact_alarm_body: Masjidy needs permission to set exact alarms so your prayer notifications fire on time — even when the phone is idle. Tap Allow to open settings.
notif_battery_body: Your phone's battery optimization may block prayer notifications when the app is closed. Please exempt Masjidy to ensure notifications always arrive on time.
change_location_subtitle: Select your city to update prayer times
privacy_intro_content: Masjidy ("App") values your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application.
privacy_data_collection_content: We collect the following types of information:
privacy_bullet_location: Location data (when you enable GPS) - used to find nearby mosques and calculate accurate prayer times for your area
privacy_bullet_preferences: User preferences - your selected language, theme settings, and notification preferences
privacy_bullet_favorites: Favorite mosques - the list of mosques you save locally on your device
privacy_data_usage_title: How Do We Use Your Data?
privacy_data_usage_content: Your data is used solely to provide and improve the Masjidy experience:
privacy_bullet_prayer_times: Calculate accurate prayer times based on your location
privacy_bullet_mosques: Display nearby mosques and their information
privacy_bullet_notifications: Send prayer time notifications (if you enable them)
privacy_data_security_content: Your location data is processed locally on your device and is never sent to our servers or sold to third parties. We take your privacy seriously and do not track or monitor your location history. All user data is encrypted and stored securely on your device.
privacy_third_party_content: Masjidy uses the following third-party services:
privacy_bullet_google_places: Google Places API - to display mosque information and details
privacy_bullet_google_maps: Google Maps - to show mosque locations and provide directions
privacy_user_rights_content: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your personal data at any time. Since all data is stored locally on your device, you can simply uninstall the app to completely remove all stored information. You can disable location services in your device settings at any time.
privacy_contact_content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at ahmedalaa10204@gmail.com
privacy_acceptance: By using Masjidy, you accept the terms of this Privacy Policy. We may update this policy periodically, and your continued use of the app constitutes your acceptance of any changes.
support_subtitle: We're here to help. Choose how you'd like to reach us.
support_email_desc: For general questions and support issues
dev_email_desc: For bug reports and technical problems
feedback_email_desc: Share your ideas and suggestions for improvement
support_report_bugs_content: Found an issue? Please email our technical team with a description of what went wrong, what you were doing when it happened, and your device information. Include screenshots if possible. This helps us fix problems faster.
support_suggest_features_content: Have an idea to make Masjidy better? We'd love to hear it! Email us your feature suggestions with details about how it would improve your experience. We review all suggestions and implement the most popular ones.
support_response_time_content: We aim to respond to all emails within 24-48 hours during business days. For urgent issues, please mark your email as urgent. Follow-up emails may take longer during peak times.
support_thank_you: Thank you for using Masjidy. Your feedback helps us continue to improve and serve you better.
